title: Skyblock Dark UI
description: A Hypixel Skyblock Dark UI Resource Pack designed for modern Minecraft Versions inspired by the PacksHQ Dark UI
body:
Skyblock Dark UI is a resource pack for Hypixel SkyBlock on modern versions of Minecraft. It textures all GUI's including GUI's from mods in a dark color.

It is inspired by the [PacksHQ Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/packshq-dark)
